---
title: "ONT_sim"
author: "Mona Taouk"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)

library(tidyverse)
library(scales)

setwd("~/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-TheUniversityofMelbourne/2025(Ingle_Postdoc)/ONT_read_simulator/ONT-Read-Simulator-Benchmarking")

data <- read.csv("all_tools_stats.tsv", sep = "\t")

```

```{r}
ggplot(data, aes(x = read_length, fill = tool)) +
  geom_histogram(aes(weight = read_length), binwidth = 1000, alpha = 0.8, position = "identity") +
  facet_wrap(~tool, scales = "free_y") +
  scale_x_continuous(labels = scales::comma, 
                     limits = c(0, 100000)) +
  theme_bw() +
  labs(x = "Read length (bp)",
    y = "Count",
    title = "Read length distribution per simulation tool") +
  theme(legend.position = "none",
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    axis.text.y = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks.y = element_blank())
```

```{r}
ggplot(data, aes(x = actual_identity, fill = tool)) +
  geom_histogram(binwidth = 0.01, alpha = 0.8, position = "identity") +
  facet_wrap(~tool, scales = "free_y") +
  theme_bw() +
  labs(x = "Percentage identity",
    y = "Count",
    title = "Read identities") +
  theme(legend.position = "none",
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    axis.text.y = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks.y = element_blank())
```

```{r}
ggplot(data, aes(x = mean_qscore, fill = tool)) +
  geom_histogram(binwidth = 1, alpha = 0.8, position = "identity") +
  facet_wrap(~tool, scales = "free_y") +
  scale_x_continuous(labels = scales::comma) +
  theme_bw() +
  labs(x = "Q-score",
    y = "Count",
    title = "Q-score") +
  theme(legend.position = "none",
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    axis.text.y = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks.y = element_blank())
```

```{r}

data$Identity_Qscore <- -10 * log10(pmax(1 - data$actual_identity, 1e-10))

ggplot(data, aes(Identity_Qscore, fill = tool)) +
  geom_histogram() +
  facet_wrap(~ tool)


```

```{r}
ggplot(data, aes(x = mean_qscore, y = actual_identity, color = tool)) +
  #geom_point(alpha = 0.5, size = 1.5) +     
  geom_smooth(method = "loess", se = FALSE) +       
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent_format(accuracy = 1)) +
  labs(
    title = "Q Score vs Actual Identity per Tool",
    x = "Mean Phred Q Score",
    y = "Actual Identity (%)",
    color = "Tool"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "right",
    panel.grid.major = element_line(color = "grey90"),
    panel.grid.minor = element_line(color = "grey95")
  )
```

```{r}
gono_PBSIM3 <- read.csv("test_stats.tsv", sep = "\t")

ggplot(gono_PBSIM3, aes(x = read_length)) +
  geom_histogram(aes(weight = read_length), binwidth = 1000, alpha = 0.8, position = "identity") +
  scale_x_continuous(labels = scales::comma, 
                     limits = c(0, 100000)) +
  theme_bw() +
  labs(x = "Read length (bp)",
    y = "Count",
    title = "Read length distribution") +
  theme(legend.position = "none",
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    axis.text.y = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks.y = element_blank())

```

```{r}
ggplot(gono_PBSIM3, aes(x = actual_identity)) +
  geom_histogram(binwidth = 0.01, alpha = 0.8, position = "identity") +
  theme_bw() +
  labs(x = "Percentage identity",
    y = "Count",
    title = "Read identities") +
  theme(legend.position = "none",
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    axis.text.y = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks.y = element_blank())
```

```{r}
ggplot(gono_PBSIM3, aes(x = mean_qscore)) +
  geom_histogram(binwidth = 1, alpha = 0.8, position = "identity") +
  scale_x_continuous(labels = scales::comma) +
  theme_bw() +
  labs(x = "Q-score",
    y = "Count",
    title = "Q-score") +
  theme(legend.position = "none",
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    axis.text.y = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks.y = element_blank())
```

```{r}

ggplot(gono_PBSIM3, aes(x = mean_qscore, y = actual_identity)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.5, size = 1.5) +         
  geom_smooth(method = "loess", se = FALSE) +       
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent_format(accuracy = 1)) +
  labs(
    title = "Q Score vs Actual Identity",
    x = "Mean Phred Q Score",
    y = "Actual Identity (%)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "right",
    panel.grid.major = element_line(color = "grey90"),
    panel.grid.minor = element_line(color = "grey95")
  )

```
